name: home-departure-board
description: A kiosk-friendly home departure board for Adolf-Ehrmann-Bad toward Karlsruhe Hbf.

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/shared build && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/backend dev" "pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/frontend start"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/shared build && pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/backend build && pnpm build:vercel-api && pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/shared build && pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/shared test && pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/backend test && pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/frontend test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/shared build && pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/shared lint && pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/backend lint && pnpm --filter @home-departure-board/frontend lint
